itemName.zh: Mystery Ranch Terraframe 背包（橄榄绿）

description.zh:
嘿，还有一件事要告诉你。当你在宿舍楼搜查的时候，我那边的人顺便去查看了一下那些运货的车。

结果发现，我们前脚刚离开，后脚就有人也在打听TerraGroup集团的货物！我们的人在卡车附近看到了一些行动人员，还拍了照片，所有的线索都指向一个可能性——那些人是Therapist派来的，搞笑吧？

说实话，我可不想再和其他商人起冲突，已经有不少人对我不太感冒了。但这事也不能就这么算了，咱们还是得文明地谈一谈，我相信她也会这么想。你比我更了解她，所以这活还是你来吧。

和她谈谈我们这次调查到的“TerraGroup集团的事”，看看能不能有个说法，达成点什么共识。
description.en:
Hey, there's one more thing actually, while you were searching around the dorms, a few of my guys checked on the trucks that carry the shipments.

It turns out someone else was sniffing around the Terragroup cargoes! My team spotted some operators around these trucks, my guys took some photos of them and all the evidence leads me to believe that these operators are Therapist's people, ridiculous!

It's not in my interest to start some fight with more vendors, after all I'm already unpopular enough among some dealers. We gotta talk this out the civilized way, and I'm sure she would do it the same way, you know her better than me so you would know.

Contact her about the Terragroup "thing" we investigated, we'll see if we can work something out.
